### 🎯 **Specific Information Needed**

#### **Technical Information**
- [ ] mLLMCelltype methodology and consensus approach
- [ ] Performance metrics and accuracy comparisons
- [ ] LLM provider integrations and ecosystem
- [ ] Cost optimization and efficiency benefits
- [ ] Future development roadmap

#### **Market Position**
- [ ] Competitive analysis vs other tools
- [ ] Community adoption and growth metrics
- [ ] Academic partnerships and collaborations
- [ ] Industry impact and use cases

#### **Human Interest**
- [ ] Developer background and motivation
- [ ] Origin story and development journey
- [ ] User success stories and testimonials
- [ ] Community contributions and open source philosophy

## 📋 **For mLLMCelltype Team Use**

**Response Priority**: 
- [ ] High (Major publication, tight deadline)
- [ ] Medium (Industry publication, reasonable timeline)
- [ ] Low (Blog post, flexible timeline)

**Team Assignment**:
- [ ] Technical lead for methodology questions
- [ ] Community manager for adoption metrics
- [ ] Principal investigator for research context
- [ ] Marketing coordinator for messaging

**Media Kit Sent**: 
- [ ] Press release template
- [ ] High-res images and logos
- [ ] Fact sheet with key statistics
- [ ] Executive biography

**Thank you for your interest in covering mLLMCelltype! We're committed to providing accurate, timely information to help tell the story of consensus-based cell annotation and its impact on biological research.**
